---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the user need or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you'd like to see built.

**Who benefits?**
Which role(s) — agent, admin, manager, supervisor?

**Priority**
- [ ] Critical (blocking core workflow)
- [ ] High (important but workaround exists)
- [ ] Normal
- [ ] Low / nice-to-have
